name: ominiterm
description: An OminiTerm desktop app for managing project terminals in a board-first workspace

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-isolation=none tests/pty-launch.test.ts tests/pty-manager.test.ts tests/window-events.test.ts tests/session-watcher.test.ts tests/process-detector.test.ts tests/preferences-store.test.ts tests/insights-engine.test.ts tests/terminal-state.test.ts tests/terminal-focus-scheduler.test.ts tests/terminal-adapters.test.ts tests/composer-submit.test.ts tests/composer-input-behavior.test.ts tests/composer-store.test.ts tests/slash-commands.test.ts tests/shortcut-behavior.test.ts tests/keyboard-shortcut-dispatch.test.ts tests/ui-shell-store.test.ts tests/project-board-options.test.ts tests/git-diff.test.ts tests/project-store-sync-worktrees.test.ts tests/project-store-focus.test.ts tests/api-rescan.test.ts tests/state-persistence.test.ts tests/ai-config-persistence.test.ts tests/ai-config-manager.test.ts tests/migrate-legacy-local-storage.test.ts tests/title-helper.test.ts tests/repository-metadata.test.ts tests/agent-command.test.ts
